title: Dos and Don'ts block: schema type and serialization
description: Add a new block type `dos-donts` (Fase 8): a single-item card with a variant (`do`/`dont`), an optional cover (image or component-embed), a title, and a rich-text description. This task lands the type definitions and the server/admin serialization round-trip only — no editor UI yet. Mirrors the pattern established for `callout` (TASK-28/31): a Tiptap node with `block+` content for the description, attrs for variant/titulo/cover.
acceptanceCriteria: `DosDontsBlockContent` exported from `@systembook/schema` (packages/schema/src/block.ts): `{ variant: 'do' | 'dont', titulo: string, descricao: TiptapJson, cover?: { kind: 'image', src: string, alt: string } | { kind: 'component-embed', componentName: string, variantId: string | null } }`, added to the `Block` union and `BlockType`

`BLOCK_TYPES` in `apps/server/src/db/schema.ts` includes `'dos-donts'`; the `_assertAllBlockTypes` exhaustiveness check still compiles — no DB migration needed (per TASK-30's decision, `tipo` is validated at the application layer, not via SQLite CHECK)

`apps/server/src/blocks/serialize.ts` round-trips a Tiptap node (proposed type name `dosDonts`, attrs `{ variant, titulo, cover }`, `content` holding the rich-text description as `block+`, mirroring how `callout` nests its body) to/from a `dos-donts` block row
`apps/admin/src/features/revisions/blocksToTiptapDoc.ts` mirrors the same mapping (server and admin duplicate this mapping deliberately, per the existing note in that file)

`extractSearchableText` in `apps/server/src/db/search.ts` includes `dos-donts` titulo + descricao text so the block is findable via `search.query` (TASK-53), mirroring how `callout`'s nested content is already extracted

steps.details: Define `DosDontsVariant = 'do' | 'dont'`, `DosDontsCover` (discriminated union by `kind`), `DosDontsBlockContent`, `DosDontsBlock = BlockBase<'dos-donts', DosDontsBlockContent>`; add to `Block` and `BlockType`.

steps.description: Register the block type on the server
steps.details: Add `'dos-donts'` to `BLOCK_TYPES` in `apps/server/src/db/schema.ts` (keeps the `satisfies readonly BlockType[]` and exhaustiveness assert both compiling — no migration, per the TASK-30 decision documented in that file).

In `tiptapDocToBlocks`/`blocksToTiptapDoc` (`apps/server/src/blocks/serialize.ts`): map the `dosDonts` Tiptap node (attrs `variant`, `titulo`, `cover`; `content` = the description, `block+`) to/from the `dos-donts` block row, following the same nested-content pattern used for `callout`. Mirror identically in `apps/admin/src/features/revisions/blocksToTiptapDoc.ts`.

Update `extractSearchableText` (and its block-type allowlist) in `apps/server/src/db/search.ts` to pull text from `dos-donts.titulo` and the paragraph/heading/list text nested in `descricao`, mirroring the existing `callout` handling.

Extend `apps/server/src/blocks/serialize.test.ts` with a round-trip case per cover kind (image, component-embed, no cover) and extend the FTS test (`search.test.ts`) to confirm a `dos-donts` block's titulo/descricao text is indexed and searchable after publish.

technicalNotes: No Drizzle migration is needed — `blocks.tipo` is validated in the application layer (`BLOCK_TYPES` + zod enum), not a SQLite CHECK, exactly the decision documented in TASK-30's spec.
Naming convention: kebab-case block `tipo` (`dos-donts`) but camelCase Tiptap node name (`dosDonts`), mirroring `component-embed` / `componentEmbed`.
This task is intentionally scoped to types + serialization only — the editor NodeView (TASK-72), cover picker (TASK-73), and public render (TASK-74) build on top of it.
